science.title: Scientists discover inherited traits that break Mendel’s Laws of genetics
science.summary: A major mouse study found that some inherited traits are passed down through epigenetic changes that break the classic rules of genetics. science.title: New solar desalination breakthrough makes fresh water without toxic brine
science.summary: Scientists have developed a solar desalination system that turns seawater into drinking water without creating environmentally damaging brine. science.title: The ocean's health may depend on a tiny microbe inside fish
science.summary: A surprising new discovery suggests that tiny microbes living inside fish may be helping shape the chemistry of the world’s oceans. science.title: Scottish wrens may be evolving into new species through island gigantism
science.summary: Tiny birds on remote Scottish islands are undergoing a dramatic evolutionary transformation. Scientists studying four isolated populations of British Wrens discovered that some island birds have grown astonishingly large — with the biggest St Kilda Wrens weighing more than twice as much as the smallest mainland birds.
